signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Pending Senate Confirmation Amid Inflation Pressures and Rate Hold | YES
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair, Pending Senate Confirmation Amid Inflation Pressures and Rate Hold | YES | HIGH confidence** [1][2]

President Trump announced his intent to nominate Kevin Warsh, a former Fed governor, to replace Jerome Powell as Fed Chair when Powell's term ends in May 2026, pending Senate confirmation.[2] This comes after the Fed held rates steady earlier this week

signals.headline: Solana (SOL) hits all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions at 148 million h
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) hits all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders with daily non-vote transactions at 148 million highs, bolstered by Alpenglow upgrade progress to 150ms finality | YES | HIGH confidence[1]**

Institutional players like BlackRock and Fidelity disclose record SOL ETF holdings amid Firedancer validator advances, signaling robust demand despite price compression around $82[1][3].

signals.raw:
Solana Drift Protocol hack on April 1 resolved $280M theft via social engineering on multisig; protocol suspended functions, updated security, pursuing recovery with law enforcement | NO | MED confidence[5]**

No other resolutions or April 15 confirmations in results would move prediction markets like price targets or ETF approvals.
